member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.InMemoryWorkbookRepository
member.summary: Repository for multi-document orchestration scenarios. Manages multiple workbooks in memory with support for creation and import.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.InMemoryWorkbookRepository.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with no documents.
member.param: Timeout for import operations, or null to allow unlimited time. For security against DDoS attacks, explicitly choose a value or null.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.IWorkbookRepository
member.summary: Provides a unified interface for managing spreadsheet workbooks. Extends IDocumentRepository with spreadsheet-specific creation capabilities.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering Spreadsheet agent tools and related services with an .

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSpreadsheetAgentTools(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Core.DocumentProcessingOptions)
member.summary: Adds Spreadsheet agent tools to the service collection.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingFormulaTools
member.summary: Formula and calculation tools for spreadsheets. These tools allow formula evaluation and discovery without modifying the document.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingReadTools
member.summary: Read-only spreadsheet tools for querying and analyzing workbook data without modification. These tools are safe for analysis-only scenarios.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingWorksheetTools
member.summary: Worksheet management tools for creating, deleting, and organizing worksheets in a workbook. These tools modify the workbook structure but not cell content.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingWriteTools
member.summary: Document editing tools for writing data, applying styles, and formatting spreadsheets. These tools modify cell content and formatting in the workbook.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools
member.summary: Core implementation of high-level data analysis tools for spreadsheets using Split-Apply-Combine operations. These tools enable filtering, grouping, and aggregation without requiring formula knowledge.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.DescribeData(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets worksheet structure and column information in a single call.
Aggregates data with optional filtering and grouping.
Retrieves rows matching filter criteria.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.DescribeSingleRegion(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.CellRange,System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Describes a single data region (default mode).

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.DescribeColumn(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Describes a single column with header, type, and samples.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.AnalyzeColumn(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Analyzes a column to determine type, sample values, and unique count. Uses GetCellData for proper type inference including date detection.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.DescribeRegionBlock(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.DataRegion,System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Formats one region's block for multi-region DescribeData output.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.AppendChartsAndImagesSection(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Appends a summary of charts and images present on the worksheet, if any. Shown at the end of both single-region and multi-region DescribeData output so the LLM is aware of non-tabular visual content when describing the sheet.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.DetectHierarchicalSumPattern(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Scans the data range for cells whose value is a SUM formula that references the same column — a definitive structural sign that the column contains both individual rows and computed aggregates of those rows (financial statement / hierarchical outline pattern). Returns a human-readable description of the first such cell found (e.g. "B12 contains =SUM(B2:B11)"), or null when none is found.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.AppendHierarchicalDataWarning(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Appends a prominent warning to the DescribeData output when a SUM formula referencing the same column is found — the definitive structural indicator of hierarchical data (financial statements, outlines) where summing naively would double-count.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.DetectRegions(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet)
member.summary: Scans the worksheet for rectangular data blocks separated by empty rows. Returns regions sorted by data row count descending so index 0 is always the largest (primary) table. Each region's column extent is detected independently.
Performs the actual aggregation with row iteration.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.DetectFormulaBaseRow(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Detects the 1-based row number used in a formula expression by finding the first cell reference. Falls back to if no reference is found.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.AdjustFormulaRow(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adjusts all cell reference row numbers in a formula from one row to another. For example, "J2*K2" with baseRow=2, targetRow=5 becomes "J5*K5".
Formats aggregation results with HAVING filter, sorting, and limit.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.BuildGroupKey(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Builds a group key from the specified columns.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.FormatNumber(System.Double)
member.summary: Formats a number for display (removes unnecessary decimals).
Formats GetRows results as a readable table.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.TruncateAndPad(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Truncates string to width and pads with spaces.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.IndexToColumnLetter(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a 0-based column index to Excel column letter(s).

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.GetCellData(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Extracts typed cell data: formatted string, raw numeric value, and date flag. Uses the cell's own CellValueFormat for proper display formatting. For numbers, returns the raw double directly (no string round-trip). For dates, sets IsDateTime and stores the OADate in NumericValue.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.SpreadProcessingAnalysisTools.GetCellValueAsString(Telerik.Windows.Documents.Spreadsheet.Model.Worksheet,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the formatted cell value as a string using the cell's own format. Convenience wrapper around .

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.AggregateState
member.summary: Tracks aggregation state for a single group.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.AggregationType
member.summary: Specifies the type of aggregation to perform.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.AggregationType.Count
member.summary: Count the number of matching rows.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.AggregationType.Sum
member.summary: Sum the values in the specified column.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.AggregationType.Average
member.summary: Calculate the average of values in the specified column.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.AggregationType.Min
member.summary: Find the minimum value in the specified column.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.AggregationType.Max
member.summary: Find the maximum value in the specified column.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.AggregationType.CountDistinct
member.summary: Count distinct values in the specified column.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriteriaLogic
member.summary: Specifies how multiple criteria are combined.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriteriaLogic.And
member.summary: All criteria must match (logical AND).

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriteriaLogic.Or
member.summary: Any criterion must match (logical OR).

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.SortOrder
member.summary: Specifies the sort order for results.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.SortOrder.Ascending
member.summary: Sort from smallest to largest.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.SortOrder.Descending
member.summary: Sort from largest to smallest.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator
member.summary: Specifies the comparison operator for filter criteria.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.Equals
member.summary: Cell value equals the criterion value (case-insensitive for text, numeric comparison for numbers).

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.NotEquals
member.summary: Cell value does not equal the criterion value.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.GreaterThan
member.summary: Cell value is greater than the criterion value (numeric comparison).

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.GreaterThanOrEqual
member.summary: Cell value is greater than or equal to the criterion value.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.LessThan
member.summary: Cell value is less than the criterion value (numeric comparison).

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.LessThanOrEqual
member.summary: Cell value is less than or equal to the criterion value.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.Contains
member.summary: Cell value contains the criterion value as a substring (case-insensitive).

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.StartsWith
member.summary: Cell value starts with the criterion value (case-insensitive).

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.EndsWith
member.summary: Cell value ends with the criterion value (case-insensitive).

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.IsEmpty
member.summary: Cell is empty or contains only whitespace.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.IsNotEmpty
member.summary: Cell is not empty.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.LengthGreaterThan
member.summary: Cell value string length is greater than the criterion integer value.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionOperator.LengthLessThan
member.summary: Cell value string length is less than the criterion integer value.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CellData
member.summary: Represents extracted cell data with typed values for efficient comparison.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CellData.FormattedValue
member.summary: Display string using the cell's own format.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CellData.NumericValue
member.summary: Raw numeric value if the cell contains a number (including dates stored as OADate).

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CellData.IsDateTime
member.summary: Whether the numeric value represents a date/time based on the cell format.

member.name: F:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CellData.IsEmpty
member.summary: Whether the cell is empty.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.Criterion
member.summary: Represents a filter criterion for data analysis.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.Criterion.Column
member.summary: The column index (0-based) to apply the criterion to.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.Criterion.Operator
member.summary: The comparison operator to use for matching.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.Criterion.Value
member.summary: The value to compare against.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionMatcher
member.summary: Static utility for criterion matching with typed cell data.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionMatcher.Prepare(System.Collections.Generic.List{Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.Criterion})
member.summary: Prepares criteria by pre-parsing values (done once, not per-row).

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionMatcher.Matches(Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CellData,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.PreparedCriterion)
member.summary: Checks if a cell's typed data matches a prepared criterion. Uses NumericValue directly for numeric comparisons (no string re-parsing).
Checks if a row matches all prepared criteria with the specified logic.

member.name: M:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.CriterionMatcher.PassesHaving(System.Double,Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.HavingCriterion)
member.summary: Checks if an aggregated value passes the HAVING criterion.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.DataRegion
member.summary: Represents a detected data region in a worksheet.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.HavingCriterion
member.summary: Represents a HAVING filter applied to aggregated results.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.HavingCriterion.Operator
member.summary: The comparison operator for the HAVING filter. Valid values: Equals, NotEquals, GreaterThan, LessThan, GreaterThanOrEqual, LessThanOrEqual.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.HavingCriterion.Value
member.summary: The numeric value to compare the aggregated result against.

member.name: T:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.PreparedCriterion
member.summary: Pre-parsed criterion with operator and value parsing done once.

member.name: P:Telerik.Documents.AI.Tools.Spreadsheet.Core.AnalysisModels.PreparedCriterion.DateValue
member.summary: Parsed date value when the criterion string represents a date. Used for date-aware cell comparisons.
